name: I have a pre-existing back issue and hurt it worse at work, can I still get comp in Sandy Utah?

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing back issue and hurt it worse at work, can I still get comp in Sandy Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, aggravations of pre-existing conditions qualify with medical proof.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if work aggravated it, Utah covers occupational aggravations with medical causation proof.[1] Workers' comp includes conditions worsened by job duties.[1] Key factors: Doctor links aggravation to work via AOE/COE test; report timely; no need to prove full causation.[1][2] Practical guidance: Tell your doctor exactly how work worsened it, document prior records, and avoid insurer traps questioning pre-existing issues. An attorney helps prove compensability.

description: Yes, aggravations of pre-existing conditions qualify with medical proof.[1]
